channel.title: AI Daily
channel.description: Daily AI, Agents & Agentic Commerce News Podcast
channel.itunes:author: Michael Lugassy

item.title: OpenAI Ads, Apple Choices, Meta Agents: May AI
item.description: This episode examines OpenAI's self-serve ChatGPT advertising platform targeting billions in revenue, Apple's Extensions allowing third-party AI model selection in iOS 27, and Meta's agentic assistant with Instagram shopping integration, alongside Anthropic's Wall Street deployment venture and SpaceX compute deal plus stablecoin agent payments.
item.itunes:summary: This episode examines OpenAI's self-serve ChatGPT advertising platform targeting billions in revenue, Apple's Extensions allowing third-party AI model selection in iOS 27, and Meta's agentic assistant with Instagram shopping integration, alongside Anthropic's Wall Street deployment venture and SpaceX compute deal plus stablecoin agent payments.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Pentagon AI Deals, Agent Hijacks & GPT Surprises
item.description: This episode covers the Pentagon's classified AI agreements with Nvidia, Microsoft and AWS; Google's warnings on hidden web commands hijacking AI agents; Meta's humanoid robotics acquisition; Oxford research on overly friendly AI errors; and OpenAI's GPT-5.4 surpassing humans in autonomous tasks, plus related lawsuit updates.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers the Pentagon's classified AI agreements with Nvidia, Microsoft and AWS; Google's warnings on hidden web commands hijacking AI agents; Meta's humanoid robotics acquisition; Oxford research on overly friendly AI errors; and OpenAI's GPT-5.4 surpassing humans in autonomous tasks, plus related lawsuit updates.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: US AI Tests, Agent Payments & Wall Street Agents
item.description: This episode covers US pre-release AI model testing agreements, Anthropic's financial agents launch, and AWS-enabled autonomous agent payments, plus new models and funding rounds.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers US pre-release AI model testing agreements, Anthropic's financial agents launch, and AWS-enabled autonomous agent payments, plus new models and funding rounds.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Anthropic $200B Deal, AI Layoffs & UAE Agentic Push
item.description: This episode covers Anthropic's record $200 billion Google Cloud commitment that briefly overtook Nvidia in market value, Coinbase and PayPal's AI-driven layoffs of thousands, and the UAE's plan to automate half its government with agentic AI, alongside Chinese model advances and new agent tools.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers Anthropic's record $200 billion Google Cloud commitment that briefly overtook Nvidia in market value, Coinbase and PayPal's AI-driven layoffs of thousands, and the UAE's plan to automate half its government with agentic AI, alongside Chinese model advances and new agent tools.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Funding Surge, Chatbot Lawsuit & Agent Tools
item.description: Covers Sierra's $950M raise for enterprise AI customer agents, Pennsylvania's lawsuit against Character.AI for doctor impersonation, PayPal's $1.5B AI-driven restructuring, plus advances in video generation, agent governance and coding pricing.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Sierra's $950M raise for enterprise AI customer agents, Pennsylvania's lawsuit against Character.AI for doctor impersonation, PayPal's $1.5B AI-driven restructuring, plus advances in video generation, agent governance and coding pricing.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: EU Dilutes AI Rules, Agent Launches & Revenue Hits
item.description: This episode covers the EU's agreement to dilute and delay AI Act rules, OpenAI's Trusted Contact rollout and Voice API launch, Google's testing of the Remy agent, Meta's agentic assistant development, Coder's enterprise agent launch, ElevenLabs reaching $500M ARR, SAP's $1.18B AI lab plans, and OpenAI-Oracle supercluster deal.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers the EU's agreement to dilute and delay AI Act rules, OpenAI's Trusted Contact rollout and Voice API launch, Google's testing of the Remy agent, Meta's agentic assistant development, Coder's enterprise agent launch, ElevenLabs reaching $500M ARR, SAP's $1.18B AI lab plans, and OpenAI-Oracle supercluster deal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Agent Payments, iOS AI Picks & DeepSeek Billions
item.description: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT self-serve ads, Amazon enables AI agent stablecoin payments with Coinbase and Stripe, Apple introduces third-party model choice on iOS 27, Anthropic lands SpaceX compute and Wall Street deployment deals, Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability, and DeepSeek targets $50 billion valuation.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT self-serve ads, Amazon enables AI agent stablecoin payments with Coinbase and Stripe, Apple introduces third-party model choice on iOS 27, Anthropic lands SpaceX compute and Wall Street deployment deals, Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability, and DeepSeek targets $50 billion valuation.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Cerebras $4.8B IPO, Anthropic Boom & AI Zero-Day
item.description: Covers Cerebras upsizing its IPO to $4.8 billion, Anthropic revealing 80x Q1 revenue growth with $44 billion ARR, OpenAI launching a $4 billion-backed deployment company, Pentagon signing AI deals excluding Anthropic, and Google detecting the first AI-developed zero-day exploit.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Cerebras upsizing its IPO to $4.8 billion, Anthropic revealing 80x Q1 revenue growth with $44 billion ARR, OpenAI launching a $4 billion-backed deployment company, Pentagon signing AI deals excluding Anthropic, and Google detecting the first AI-developed zero-day exploit.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Korea AI Dividend, CME Futures & SAP Agents
item.description: South Korea considers AI profit dividends for citizens, CME announces compute futures for AI hedging, SAP introduces autonomous AI agents for business operations, with OpenAI cybersecurity tools, youth job polls and more.
item.itunes:summary: South Korea considers AI profit dividends for citizens, CME announces compute futures for AI hedging, SAP introduces autonomous AI agents for business operations, with OpenAI cybersecurity tools, youth job polls and more.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Meta Incognito AI, AI Banks & Orbital Compute
item.description: Meta launched private Incognito Chat for Meta AI on WhatsApp, Augustus received approval for the first AI-native clearing bank, and new research revealed AI agents causing harm in 41% of tasks while Google and SpaceX explored orbital data centers.
item.itunes:summary: Meta launched private Incognito Chat for Meta AI on WhatsApp, Augustus received approval for the first AI-native clearing bank, and new research revealed AI agents causing harm in 41% of tasks while Google and SpaceX explored orbital data centers.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Anthropic Gates Pact, xAI Agent & AI Infra Surge
item.description: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation committed $200 million to AI applications in health, education and economic mobility. xAI released Grok Build early beta coding agent. Exaforce closed $125 million Series B for AI cybersecurity while Emburse and Xactly launched new autonomous agents.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation committed $200 million to AI applications in health, education and economic mobility. xAI released Grok Build early beta coding agent. Exaforce closed $125 million Series B for AI cybersecurity while Emburse and Xactly launched new autonomous agents.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy
